title: Nuxt
excerpt: description: Web framework making Vue.js-based development simple and powerful. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Nuxt ↗](https://nuxt.com) is a web framework making Vue.js-based development simple and powerful. In this guide, you will create a new Nuxt application and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages.
